summary: Excellent recording that can be EQ‑tuned to perfect clarity; no specific show details were provided.
review: The reviewer praises the tape’s overall fidelity, noting that while there is some sibilance and muted highs in the 7 kHz range, a simple EQ adjustment restores full sparkle and allows loud playback without distortion. No comments on the musical performance are given, so the show quality remains unassessed.

ai_rating.rationale: A single five‑star review highlights a high‑quality recording that can be easily corrected with EQ, but offers no insight into the performance; thus rating leans heavily on recording quality with moderate confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Slight sibilance around 7 kHz and muted highs noted, but can be fully corrected with EQ; playback remains clean at high volume.
